#+TITLE: Nested checklist fixtures
#+CATEGORY: Fixtures

Each heading's body is the "input" the frontend would send to a save.
The :EXPECTED: property holds the body we expect after save-side
parent-checkbox propagation runs (delegated to org-list-struct-fix-box).
Bodies are written flush-left so the literal indentation we care about
is the nesting depth, not the heading offset.

* dash: all children checked → parent X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [X] Parent\n  - [X] A\n  - [X] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  - [X] A
  - [X] B

* dash: mixed children → parent dash
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [-] Parent\n  - [X] A\n  - [ ] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  - [X] A
  - [ ] B

* dash: all children unchecked → parent stays blank
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [ ] Parent\n  - [ ] A\n  - [ ] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  - [ ] A
  - [ ] B

* dash: one in-progress child → parent dash
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [-] Parent\n  - [-] A\n  - [ ] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  - [-] A
  - [ ] B

* plus: all children checked → parent X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: + [X] Parent\n  + [X] A\n  + [X] B
:END:
+ [ ] Parent
  + [X] A
  + [X] B

* plus: mixed → parent dash
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: + [-] Parent\n  + [X] A\n  + [ ] B
:END:
+ [ ] Parent
  + [X] A
  + [ ] B

* star-indented: all checked → parent X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [X] Parent\n  * [X] A\n  * [X] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  * [X] A
  * [X] B

* ordered numeric dot: all checked → parent X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: 1. [X] Parent\n   1. [X] A\n   2. [X] B
:END:
1. [ ] Parent
   1. [X] A
   2. [X] B

* ordered numeric paren: all checked → parent X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: 1) [X] Parent\n   1) [X] A\n   2) [X] B
:END:
1) [ ] Parent
   1) [X] A
   2) [X] B

* three-level all checked → all ancestors X
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [X] Root\n  - [X] Mid\n    - [X] Leaf
:END:
- [ ] Root
  - [ ] Mid
    - [X] Leaf

* three-level mixed → chain of dashes
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [-] Root\n  - [X] Mid\n    - [X] Leaf A\n    - [X] Leaf B\n  - [ ] Mid 2
:END:
- [ ] Root
  - [ ] Mid
    - [X] Leaf A
    - [X] Leaf B
  - [ ] Mid 2

* mixed bullet styles in one list
:PROPERTIES:
:EXPECTED: - [X] Parent\n  + [X] A\n  + [X] B
:END:
- [ ] Parent
  + [X] A
  + [X] B
